name: Car Factory For Kids
description: Build and race your dream car in Car Factory For Kids! This exciting experience combines creativity, assembly, and racing into one fun-packed adventure, making it a perfect pick for young fans of car games for kids. This playful kids car game experience brings together building and racing in a fun and interactive way. Easy controls are perfect for free car game lovers.
instructions: On PC D - accelerate W - brake On Mobile Click the on-screen button to operate
